title: New roof at Mossel Bay's Thusong Centre completed
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The section of the Thusong...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The section of the Thusong Centre where a new roof was built was officially opened on Friday 26 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The section of the Thusong Centre where a new roof was built was officially opened on Friday 26 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Following a meeting by contractors and the Mossel Bay Municipality on 16 May, construction was recently completed.","html":"Following a meeting by contractors and the Mossel Bay Municipality on 16 May, construction was recently completed."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The expansion project entailed constructing a roof over a section of the courtyard."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mayor Dirk Kotzé said this was done for a simple reason: to ensure people have a roof over their head while waiting for services.","html":"Mayor Dirk Kotzé said this was done for a simple reason: to ensure people have a roof over their head while waiting for services."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Western Cape Minister of Cultural Affairs and Sport, Ricardo Mackenzie, also attended the opening.","html":"Western Cape Minister of Cultural Affairs and Sport, Ricardo Mackenzie, also attended the opening."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: New roof at Mossel Bay's Thusong Centre completed
